---
title: "RNAseq_obesity"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library("reticulate")
library("gt")
```

## Analysis of RNA-seq from transcript abundance quantifier (Salmon (Patro et al. 2017)) using DESeq2

Create a summary table to describe each sample from the set.

```{r}
library("tximport")
library("readr")

samples <- read.table(file.path("data", "sample_summary.csv"), header = TRUE, sep = ",")[, 1:2]
samples$condition <- factor(rep(c("Ctrl", "Treat"), each=3))
samples$color <- factor(rep(c("blue", "red"), each=3))
rownames(samples) <- paste0(samples$condition, 1:3)

gt(samples)

```


```{r}
## Set cwd here - not full path
gtf <- "~/Desktop/Projects/RNAseq_obesity/data/genome/GCF_000001635.27/alias/mm10/gencode_gtf/default/mm10.gtf.gz"
txdb <- GenomicFeatures::makeTxDbFromGFF(gtf)
k <- keys(txdb, keytype="TXNAME")
tx2gene <- select(txdb, k, "GENEID", "TXNAME")

```

```{r}

files <- file.path("quants", paste0(samples$Accession,"_quant"), "quant.sf")
names(files) <- samples$Accession
txi <- tximport(files, type="salmon", tx2gene=tx2gene)

```

```{r}
names(txi)
txi$counts[1:3,1:3]
txi$length[1:3,1:3]
txi$abundance[1:3,1:3]
txi$countsFromAbundance

```

```{r}

library("DESeq2")
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(txi, samples, ~1)

```
